description: Smart Export Workflow — Reduce export from 5 calls to 1-2 via auto-resolution of project_mapping_id and bts_issue_type_id
constraints: Follow existing 3-layer pattern: MCP Tool → Service → API
Use Zod schemas as plain objects (not z.object()), matching existing tools
All tools must be registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
Vendor media types required for all API calls (Accept + Content-Type headers)
deno task check && deno task lint && deno fmt --check must all pass
Auto-resolution only runs when explicit params are omitted — explicit params skip resolution
project_mapping_id becomes optional (was required) — existing callers still work
nonGoals: Auto-creating bug tracking configurations or project mappings

glossary.auto-resolution: Handler logic that fetches and resolves missing parameters from related API endpoints
glossary.project_mapping_id: ID linking a Polaris project to an external bug tracker project
glossary.bts_issue_type_id: ID for the external bug tracker issue type (e.g., Bug, Task in Jira)

userStories.title: Create export parameter resolution helper
userStories.description: Create src/mcp/export-helpers.ts with resolveExportParams() that auto-resolves project_mapping_id and bts_issue_type_id from config_id + project_id.
acceptanceCriteria: src/mcp/export-helpers.ts exports resolveExportParams(configId, projectId, btsIssueTypeId?)
Function fetches project mappings via bug tracking service and finds the mapping matching projectId
Returns {projectMappingId, issueTypeId} on success
Returns clear error message string if no mapping found — guides user to get_config_project_mappings or create_config_project_mapping
Returns clear error message if mapping has no default issue type and btsIssueTypeId not provided — guides user to get_external_issue_types
If btsIssueTypeId is explicitly provided, uses that instead of auto-resolving from mapping default
Typecheck passes: deno task check

hints: Look at how get_config_project_mappings calls the service to understand the API shape
Project mappings have projectId and btsIssueType fields
The helper should import from services, not api directly (follow the 3-layer pattern)
Return type should be {projectMappingId: string, issueTypeId: string} | {error: string}

userStories.title: Add smart resolution to export_issues tool
userStories.description: Modify export_issues tool: add optional project_id param, make project_mapping_id optional, auto-resolve when omitted using resolveExportParams.
acceptanceCriteria: export_issues schema adds project_id: z.string().optional() with description about auto-resolution
export_issues schema changes project_mapping_id from required to optional
Handler calls resolveExportParams when project_mapping_id is not provided but project_id is
Handler returns errorResponse with guidance when resolution fails
Handler validates that either project_mapping_id or project_id is provided
Handler validates that bts_issue_type_id is present when creating new ticket (no bts_key)
Existing callers with explicit project_mapping_id still work unchanged
Typecheck passes: deno task check

hints: Read export-issues.ts first to understand current schema and handler
The resolution logic goes at the top of the handler, before the API call
Use the error/success pattern from resolveExportParams: if ('error' in result) return errorResponse(result.error)

userStories.title: Add pre-call validation and error messages
userStories.description: Add explicit validation in export_issues handler that converts API 500s into clear error messages. Validate required param combinations before calling the API.
acceptanceCriteria: export_issues returns errorResponse when neither project_mapping_id nor project_id is provided
export_issues returns errorResponse when bts_issue_type_id is missing and bts_key is not provided (creating new ticket)
Error messages include guidance on which tool to use to get the missing value
config_id description updated to reference get_bug_tracking_configurations
bts_issue_type_id description updated to reference get_external_issue_types
branch_id description updated to say 'If omitted, the project default branch is used'
Typecheck passes: deno task check

hints: The validation should catch params that would cause a 500 from the API and return a clear 400-style message instead
Keep error messages actionable: tell the user exactly what to do next

userStories.title: Fix pagination defaults and branch_id handling
userStories.description: Fix get_external_projects pagination default from 100 to 50 (API max). Verify and fix any other pagination defaults that exceed API limits.
acceptanceCriteria: get_external_projects uses limit of 50 instead of 100 (API max is 50)
All other offset-based pagination calls verified against known API limits
branch_id descriptions updated across export tools to clarify default branch behavior
deno task check passes
deno task lint passes
deno fmt --check passes

hints: The limit may be set in the service layer or the tool handler — check both
Look for getAllOffset() calls and check the limit parameter
Known API limits: external_projects max 50, most others max 100
